title: Claude Voice Mode to be Upgraded: Supports Switching Between Opus and Sonnet Stronger Models, Ending Haiku's Solo Dominance
excerpt: According to technology media testingcatalog, Anthropic is expected to upgrade Claude's voice mode this week, supporting the use of stronger models Opus and Son
content_html:
According to technology media testingcatalog, Anthropic is expected to upgrade Claude's voice mode this week, supporting the use of stronger models Opus and Sonnet. Currently, Claude's voice mode uniformly uses the Haiku 4.5 model, allowing users to have only basic voice conversations with AI. After the upgrade, users will have three model options, significantly enhancing the voice interaction capabilities.

Three model options available, adjustable thinking levels

Latest news says that Anthropic will provide a new model selector, allowing users to freely switch between three models: Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku, with settings options to control the "thinking" level next to them. This means users can choose different model capabilities based on the complexity of the conversation. Use the lightweight Haiku for casual chats and switch to Opus for in-depth discussions. However, the company's Mythos-level flagship model, Claude Fable, is not currently available in the voice options and is expected to be included in future versions.

content_html_zh:
据科技媒体testingcatalog显示，Anthropic预计本周将升级Claude的语音模式，支持使用更强的模型Opus和Sonnet。 目前，克劳德的语音模式统一采用Haiku 4.5模型，用户只能与AI进行基本的语音对话。 升级后，用户将拥有三种机型选择，语音交互能力大幅增强。

三种模型可供选择，可调节思维水平

最新消息称，Anthropic 将提供新的模型选择器，允许用户在 Opus、Sonnet 和 Haiku 三种模型之间自由切换，并提供设置选项来控制旁边的“思考”级别。 这意味着用户可以根据对话的复杂程度选择不同的模型功能。 使用轻量级俳句进行休闲聊天，并切换到 Opus 进行深入讨论。 不过，该公司的Mythos级旗舰机型Claude Fable目前还没有语音选项，预计会在未来的版本中包含。
